heading: Statement of policy
label: 3906 Statement of policy
text: The Congress supports the policy that the President shall take appropriate steps to promote and facilitate the adoption by the international community of the Kimberley Process Certification Scheme implemented under this chapter.
notes: Effective DateFor effective date of this section, see , set out as a note under .section 15 of Pub. L. 108–19section 3901 of this title
